items.name: bolt
items.description: Runner of the Dreamers — executes mechanical, low-reasoning tasks cheaply and fast. Runs tests, performs git operations, creates PRs.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: echo
items.description: Documentarian of the Dreamers — writes and maintains project docs, READMEs, changelogs, and ADRs from completed implementation and review outputs. Runs after Sentinel approves work.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: forge
items.description: Coder of the Dreamers — implements changes strictly against a referenced plan; incremental, minimal, disciplined.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: hone
items.description: Simplifier of the Dreamers — readability, maintainability, redundancy reduction on the full feature-branch diff. Runs once after all sub-plan cycles complete.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: nova
items.description: Replanner of the Dreamers — re-verifies remaining sub-plans against actual implementation artifacts between sub-plan cycles. Outputs a replanning decision.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: probe
items.description: Tester of the Dreamers — derives tests from plan acceptance criteria; hunts edge cases; relentless.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: sage
items.description: Researcher of the Dreamers — conducts deep, multi-perspective research on any topic. Produces comprehensive, citation-backed reports with verified sources.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: sentinel
items.description: Reviewer of the Dreamers — correctness, security, maintainability; strict, specific, actionable.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: dreamers-add-logging
items.description: Add comprehensive, production-grade logging to the project. Phased pass requiring user approval before code changes.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: dreamers-atlas-choice
items.description: Route a task to the correct Dreamers pipeline based on task type. Use when unsure whether to plan or implement.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: dreamers-clean-work
items.description: Between-milestone maintenance pass: prune stale files, check consistency, clean workspace. No implementation, no planning.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: dreamers-cleanup-comments
items.description: Code comment cleanup pass — remove redundant/stale comments and improve clarity across the codebase.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: dreamers-cleanup-comments-branch
items.description: Feature-branch comment cleanup pass — clean up comments only in files changed on the current feature branch. For use inside parent pipelines.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: dreamers-fix
items.description: Bug triage and fix pipeline. Routes to quick-fix (Forge only) or full pipeline based on bug scope.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: dreamers-full
items.description: Full Dreamers pipeline: plan a feature, implement it with agent delegation, review, test, and ship. Use when starting a new feature from scratch.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: dreamers-implement
items.description: Implementation only — execute against an existing plan file. Use when a plan already exists and is approved.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: dreamers-issue
items.description: Create a structured GitHub issue with acceptance criteria from a task description.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: dreamers-new-project
items.description: Bootstrap a brand new project from scratch: discovery questions, project brief, shell plans.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: dreamers-plan
items.description: Planning only — produce a plan file from a task description without implementing anything.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: dreamers-pr-resolve
items.description: Resolve unresolved PR review comments via the Forge → Probe → resolve threads pipeline.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: dreamers-research
items.description: Deep research with phased workflow: scoping, parallel sub-topic research, synthesis, final report.
items.author: CJ Storrs

items.name: dreamers-simplify
items.description: Run the Hone simplification pass on the current feature branch followed by Sentinel + Probe validation. Does not create branches or PRs.
items.author: CJ Storrs

collections.name: Dreamers System
collections.description: Full Dreamers system — orchestrated agents (Forge, Sentinel, Probe, Echo, Hone, Nova, Sage, Bolt), skills (plan, implement, fix, simplify, research, and more), shared refs/templates, and the Copilot instructions that wire it together.
collections.author: CJ Storrs

folderTargets.name: Dreamers Refs
folderTargets.description: Shared reference files used across Dreamers agents and skills (delegation, planning protocol, quality gates, testing mandate, etc.).

folderTargets.name: Dreamers Templates
folderTargets.description: Shared templates used by Dreamers skills (plan umbrella/sub, GitHub issue, PR description, project brief, etc.).

folderTargets.name: Instructions
folderTargets.description: Shared instruction files (e.g. comment rules) consumed by Dreamers agents.
